scripts.scrape:all: cd scripts/python && set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && venv/Scripts/python run_pipeline.py --all
scripts.scrape:ligue1: cd scripts/python && set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && venv/Scripts/python run_pipeline.py --league "Ligue 1"
scripts.scrape:dry: cd scripts/python && set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && venv/Scripts/python run_pipeline.py --all --dry-run
scripts.snapshot: cd scripts/python && set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && venv\Scripts\python snapshot_players.py
scripts.scrape:values: cd scripts/python && set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && venv/Scripts/python scrape_market_values.py
scripts.import:api-football: cd scripts/python && set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 && venv/Scripts/python import_api_football.py
